## Test plan

- [ ] `just ci` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] New public items have doc comments
- [ ] If the change adds a new dep, it's behind a feature flag (or there's an explicit case for adding to defaults)
- [ ] Breaking changes called out in commit message with `BREAKING CHANGE:` block
